playbook.intent: Last 7 days of X data → next-week content slate rooted in evidence.
playbook.scope: 30-minute Sunday review: identify which three posts moved followers, clicks, or replies and feed the insights into next week's content slate so growth compounds.

success-criteria.criterion: Top-3 posts identified by goal-aligned metric
Bottom-3 posts flagged for cause analysis
Concrete content brief for the upcoming week

stage.name: Pull

tasks.task: Export native analytics CSV or screenshot
Capture impressions, clicks, follows by post
Tag posts by hypothesis bucket (build, lesson, signal)

stage.decision-gate: Advance once each post has a numeric line entry.

stage.name: Rank
stage.intent: Top-3 and bottom-3 named with cause-of-success hypotheses.

tasks.task: Sort by goal-aligned metric (followers OR clicks OR replies)

outputs.output: Top-3 and bottom-3 list with notes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each highlighted post has a written hypothesis.

stage.name: Brief
stage.intent: A simple content brief for the next 7 days.

tasks.task: Pick 3 angles to remix top performers
Cut formats that fall in bottom-3 two weeks in a row
Add updated hooks to the swipe file

outputs.output: Content brief for the next 7 days

stage.decision-gate: Done when next-week content is scheduled or queued.

extra.value: [Cross-platform analytics, Vanity-metric reporting without action, Long custom dashboards — built-in tools only]
[Active X account with at least 7 days of posts, Access to native X analytics OR a connected analytics tool]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-twitter-x-analytics-review --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-twitter-x-analytics-review --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-twitter-x-analytics-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
